# BP-134 negative: ErrRecordNotFound is mapped separately.
lang: go
file: BP-134-safe.go
variant: gorm-first-not-found
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"fmt"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func loadUser(db *gorm.DB, user *User) error {
	err := db.First(user).Error
	if errors.Is(err, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) {
		return nil
	}
	return fmt.Errorf("load user: %w", err)
}
